```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  a <- sample(2:6,1); u <- runif(1,0,a/2); v <- runif(1,a/2,a)
  ans <- (v^2-u^2)/a^2
  vals <- round(c(ans,(v-u)/a,(v-u)/a^2,(v^2-u^2)/(2*a^2),1-ans),4)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.4f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Se $f(x)=2x/`r a^2` para $0<x<`r a`$, qual é $P(`r sprintf("%.2f",u)`<X<`r sprintf("%.2f",v)`)$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
$$P(u<X<v)=\int_u^v\frac{2x}{a^2}dx
=\frac{v^2-u^2}{a^2}
=`r sprintf("%.4f",ans)`.$$

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S7Q2_probabilidade_por_integral
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
